mythic_signature.description: Strikes never glance. Even when power is below target resistance (P < R tier), The Reaper deals 1 damage minimum instead of zero. The cumulative wear adds up — no attack is wasted.
mythic_signature.balance_note: Solid generalist stats. The signature turns every fractional hit into progress. Over a long engagement, The Reaper's presence means even a heavily armored defender will crack eventually. Particularly strong against tough-stacked turfs with high R across the board.
